SQLFunctionSpec.Name: MODEL SCORES FOR CONSTITUENT UPDATE
SQLFunctionSpec.Description: Updated function to output model scores consistently with end dates
SQLFunctionSpec.Author: HFHCON-DEV\twillis
SQLFunctionSpec.CreateFunctionSQL:
CREATE FUNCTION dbo.USR_UFN_MODELSCORESFORCONSTITUENT_UPDATE ( @CONSTITUENTID UNIQUEIDENTIFIER ) RETURNS TABLE AS RETURN ( SELECT 'ADMA' AS MODELSCORETYPE, MAPROP.ID AS CONSTITUENTID, A.STARTDATE, A.ENDDATE, A.VALUE FROM dbo.ATTRIBUTED1DBE44C8F734152BDED6C3723A96873 A INNER JOIN dbo.MODELINGANDPROPENSITY MAPROP ON MAPROP.ID = A.MODELINGANDPROPENSITYID WHERE MAPROP.ID = @CONSTITUENTID
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SIMIO - Mid Level' AS MODELSCORETYPE, MAPROP.ID AS CONSTITUENTID, A.STARTDATE, A.ENDDATE, A.VALUE FROM dbo.ATTRIBUTE628D8C79C5354CDEBA04853FF4D1129C A INNER JOIN dbo.MODELINGANDPROPENSITY MAPROP ON MAPROP.ID = A.MODELINGANDPROPENSITYID WHERE MAPROP.ID = @CONSTITUENTID
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SIMIO - Net Worth' AS MODELSCORETYPE, MAPROP.ID AS CONSTITUENTID, A.STARTDATE, A.ENDDATE, CAST(A.SIMIONETWORTHPROPENSITYCODEID AS NVARCHAR(50)) AS VALUE FROM dbo.ATTRIBUTE992C22EE8AF24ABF8E6AEF796C9EFFBB A INNER JOIN dbo.MODELINGANDPROPENSITY MAPROP ON MAPROP.ID = A.MODELINGANDPROPENSITYID WHERE MAPROP.ID = @CONSTITUENTID
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SIMIO - Planned Giving' AS MODELSCORETYPE, MAPROP.ID AS CONSTITUENTID, A.STARTDATE, A.ENDDATE, A.VALUE FROM dbo.ATTRIBUTEC14E96658FC544E0933F4DF1FA74CA6B A INNER JOIN dbo.MODELINGANDPROPENSITY MAPROP ON MAPROP.ID = A.MODELINGANDPROPENSITYID WHERE MAPROP.ID = @CONSTITUENTID );
